name: chain_ph_launch_telea_speak_like_you_always
method: [PH LAUNCH] Telea: Speak like you always know what to say

stages.task: Scrape PH daily launches — extract: product name, tagline, maker name, maker Twitter/LinkedIn, upvote count, category, launch date
Score each launch: B2B=+3, AI/SaaS=+2, <200 upvotes=+2 (less saturated), founder has Twitter=+1. Filter score >= 5. These are cold outreach targets.
Generate personalized cold email per founder referencing their specific PH launch. Offer EAS/cold email infrastructure or content services. Queue in 48h window.
